//: Template for ~/.gemini/settings.json. setup.sh installs it (patching model.name from GEMINI_MODEL) so students are never prompted AND the free-tier quota is protected. The two quota-critical settings are experimental.enableAgents=false (subagent auto-delegation caused ~75% of token burn in testing) and experimental.useModelRouter=false (stops silent drift to a costlier auto-routed model and keeps the pinned model).
